env_creation_method: copy repro_bundle/venv_seed to .venv-repro inside the fresh temp replay directory
dependency_installation_method: bundle-local venv seed copied from the validated phase-1 environment; no additional package installation is required for replay

available_on_phase1_host.libsndfile1: not probed separately on macOS host

important_runtime_assumptions: Replay must set HF_HOME and HF_HUB_CACHE to repro_bundle/hf_cache so the cached dynamic module and wav2vec2 config remain bundle-local.
Replay must set SONGFORMER_LOCAL_DIR to the bundled weights directory before AutoModel.from_pretrained is called.
The validated path is CPU fallback on the same repo-native AutoModel callable path.
